title: arnoglossum muehlenbergii
intro: Arnoglossum muehlenbergii, also known as Muhlenberg's fern or rattlesnake fern, is a type of flowering plant in the sunflower family that is native to eastern North America. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it useful for treating wounds and skin irritations. The health benefits of Arnoglossum muehlenbergii include its ability to reduce inflammation and promote healing, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and improve cardiovascular health. The plant is typically prepared as an infusion or a tincture, and can also be used in topical applications such as salves and creams to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
